prompt: Artisan sourdough loaves and baguettes arranged on a rustic wooden shelf. Dark crusts, flour-dusted surfaces, warm bakery lighting. Rich, abundant, inviting. Shot at eye level. Editorial food photography, warm amber tones.

Tray of freshly baked croissants and danishes on a marble surface. Golden flaky layers, some with fruit filling visible. Morning light, steam rising. Abundant, beautiful. Editorial food photography, warm tones.

Three celebration cakes of different sizes on a bakery counter. One with buttercream flowers, one naked cake with berries, one with smooth fondant. Warm, inviting display. Editorial food photography, soft warm tones.

Assortment of cookies and bars arranged on parchment paper — chocolate chip, snickerdoodle, brownies, lemon bars. Overhead shot, warm lighting, rustic wood surface underneath. Generous, homestyle. Editorial food photography.
